description.value: Price 20,150 gp; Slot armor; CL 9th; Weight 25 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration and illusion; Alignment chaotic neutral; Senses 120 ft.; Intelligence 14; Wisdom 10; Charisma 14; Ego 7; Communication Speech (Auran, Celestial, Common) DESCRIPTION This sky-blue suit of mistmail has the glamered armor special ability, and can once per day create a dramatic spectacle of twinkling lights, as the rainbow pattern spell. The armor is prone to dramatic soliloquies about its “prophetic visions” and “sight beyond the mystical veils”; however, it lacks actual divinatory powers. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 10,075 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells disguise self, obscuring mist, rainbow pattern
